---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Which tool?**
e.g. timeit, squeeze, peep, wargs, files, treex (or "new tool" / "general")

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem. e.g. "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen. Include example commands or output if possible.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've tried.

**Additional context**
Any other context — use cases, related tools, platform-specific needs.
